docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $90.61 FILED BY ADVANCED COMPUTER REPAIR AS TO DEFENDANT NAMEFINDERS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-20-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NAMEFINDERS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ADVANCED COMPUTER REPAIR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NAMEFINDERS $90.61 PRINCIPAL, $14.75 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $105.36 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT NAMEFINDERS HEARING SET FOR JUL-16-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JUL-16-1992, GRANTED
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-20-1992, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-07-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ADVANCED COMPUTER REPAIR IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT NAMEFINDERS EACH PARTY TO BEAR ITS OWN COSTS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
